visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a graphic-heavy intro set inside a Costco warehouse; shoppers are blurred in the background, pushed by silver metal shopping carts. A large red and blue 'COSTCO' logo dominates the center. (2) The scene cuts to a refrigerated display case holding rows of bright red beef slices in clear plastic packaging. The lighting is bright and clinical, reflecting off the plastic. (3) A panning shot reveals stacks of purple and white tissue paper packages, tiered high on wooden pallets. The warehouse shelves extend into the distance. (4) The camera focuses on boxes of Meiji Hello Panda snacks, featuring red packaging with panda illustrations, stacked in a dense, repetitive grid. (5) Handheld shots move quickly past rows of bottled beverages, including bright green 'if' coconut water and clear glass bottles of mineral water. (6) A close-up shows fresh green pomelos and yellow kiwis arranged in open cardboard crates, under bright overhead lighting. (7) The final sequence features a montage of prepared foods like salads and sushi in plastic tubs, followed by stacks of red wine bottles in wooden-style shelving.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 好市多 每週特價速報 09/15-09/21 記得追蹤我們. (2) [Subtitle]: 美國特選 無骨牛小排烤片 原價1399/KG -150 特價1249/KG. (3) [Subtitle]: 五月花 妙用棉柔抽取衛生紙 原價349 -70 特價279. (4) [Subtitle]: 舒潔 三層抽取式衛生紙 原價419 -84 特價335. (5) [Subtitle]: 明治 貓熊夾心餅乾組 原價499 -100 特價399. (6) [Subtitle]: 力士架 迷你花生巧克力 原價469 -150 特價319. (7) [Subtitle]: IF 純椰子汁 原價389 -80 特價309. (8) [Subtitle]: 寶瀅 全效能洗衣凝露 原價699 -140 特價559. (9) [Subtitle]: 產銷履歷文旦 原價329 -70 特價259. (10) [Subtitle]: 紐西蘭 陽光金圓頭18入 原價799 -100 特價699.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Multiple shoppers seen in the background aisles and moving carts.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse featuring high industrial ceilings, tall metal racking, pallets of bulk goods, and refrigerated display sections.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy, upbeat electronic pop track starts immediately with a driving synth bassline and steady percussive beats. A male narrator begins speaking in a rapid, professional broadcasting tone with high vocal arousal. (2) Each time a new product is featured, a subtle 'pop' sound effect punctuates the transition. The narrator lists the product name and current discounted price without pausing between items. (3) The background music remains constant in volume and tempo throughout the entire track, providing a lively energetic floor. (4) The narrator's pitch fluctuates upward when mentioning 'special offer' or 'discount' keywords, maintaining a persuasive and informative delivery style. (5) There is no silence; the speech is tightly edited to match the high frequency of visual cuts, creating a dense information stream.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To quickly inform Costco members of the weekly special discounts (09/15-09/21) by showcasing a wide variety of bulk products, food, and household items with clear price comparisons to encourage immediate shopping.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video is entirely dedicated to showcasing Costco products and their weekly deals, featuring brand logos and specific price drops.

high_inference.freeDescribe: Hyper-fast editing and high text density make this a classic social-native promotional short. It targets bargain-seeking consumers with rapid-fire information.
